The Trial Case Management Order dated May 7, 2014 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court. Last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is January 22, 2015. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice dictated by the C.C.P., unless plaintiffs stipulate otherwise. Time to respond to written discovery is shortened to 20 days. If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and confer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 7, 2014. Responses to the demand are due no later than November 21, 2014. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by January 20, 2015 at 3:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on January 22, 2015. Fact discovery cut-off date is January 9, 2015. Expert discovery cut-off date is January 23, 2015. No later than November 13, 2014 plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiff's claims. No later than November 13, 2014 defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. Further case management conference on December 9, 2014 at 1:30pm. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. If the parties agree that no case management conference is necessary, they shall notify the Court at least two day prior to take the CMC off calendar. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on January 26, 2015 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by January 22, 2015 at 2:00p.m. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Denise M.
